special_mechanics.name: Speed Potion
special_mechanics.description: Collectible power-up that temporarily increases player movement speed

special_mechanics.name: Monster Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Collectible potion that temporarily transforms the player into a powerful monster with altered movement properties

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia sources document gameplay mechanics (speed potions, movement-affecting items) but contain no quantified physics parameters. Movement physics values not publicly documented for this title.
sources_used: wikipedia - Zombies Ate My Neighbors article (Gameplay and Development sections)
